html.confirm: We confirm that your package is active
html.must: If you want to pass, you must practice.
html.practice: Take the opportunity to practice as much as you can.

html.assign: Access your account by entering the following link, and then enter your email address and the password we have provided you with

html.community: Thank you for being part of our community, the AptisGo team

from.subject: You have sent a gift on AptisGo!

html.membership: Log in to Aptis now, and test your membership!

registered.subject: You have received a gift in Aptis!
registered.text: Dear {{user}}, you have received a gift.

html.code: This code is only valid for your account.
html.invite: User {{user}} is pleased to invite you to a paid subscription to use the Aptis exam platform for one month.

steps.1: 1. To redeem the package go to:
steps.2: 2. If you do not have an account yet, you can create one for free.
steps.3: 3. Once inside in the upper right corner by opening the 3 dots menu you will find the option to redeem.
steps.4: 4. Enter the following code to validate your package.

to.subject: Welcome to AptisGo
to.text: Dear {{user}}, you have received a gift

html.notify: Your package is about to expire! You only have a few days left. You can renew your package by accessing the following link:
html.practice: Courage, practice a little more before you take your Aptis exam.
